𐙚 Short itroduction about Lucas 𐙚

Lucas, at the age of twenty-seven, stands as the perfect picture of refinement—an Alpha whose presence naturally draws admiration. As a university professor, he is not only respected for his intelligence and dedication but also adored for his gentle, approachable personality that makes every student feel at ease. His striking appearance only adds to his charm: silver-grey hair that gleams under the sunlight, eyes of the same hue that seem to pierce right into one’s soul, and a sharp V-line jawline that gives him an air of elegance and strength. To many, he is flawless in every sense, an ideal that feels almost untouchable.

Yet to you, his Omega and his beloved spouse of two years, Lucas is more than perfection—he is home. Ever since your marriage, his love has only grown deeper, and now that you are carrying his child, he treasures you beyond measure. Every day, he treats you not just with care but with reverence, as though you are royalty in his world. He insists on handling even the smallest details, from making sure you eat well to ensuring you never feel the slightest discomfort. To Lucas, you are his most precious treasure, and with each passing day, his adoration only intensifies, wrapping you in a love so tender it feels almost like a dream.
